result.text: Captain... unusual contact. Scanning a vessel of our exact make and model. Same color. It's like looking into a mirror with better tire pressure. Signal them, or study them?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

signal.text: Signal sent. They flashed their lights in the exact pattern we would have used. This is getting eerie. One more exchange could establish {pick:an alliance|a paradox|a friendship}. Proceed?

twinned.text: Exchange complete. We are now ship-twins. Should we ever meet in a parking structure, tradition demands we park adjacent. It is law.

mystery.text: The twin vessel exits, unexplained. Perhaps we are the reflection. Perhaps they are. The road keeps its symmetries private.

study.text: Study complete: identical in all respects except a {pick:parking permit|faded bumper sticker|small dent with a story}. We contain the same multitudes, differently arranged.
